intro:
【Up to 150 Pieces!】
Everyone’s favorite! Collect puzzle pieces of iconic Japanese dogs and complete the puzzle!
description:
Shiba Inu, Kishu Ken, Akita Inu, and many other Japanese dog breeds appear!
There are 15 stages in total!
As you clear each stage, the difficulty increases.
This game starts with 50‑piece puzzles and goes up to challenging 150‑piece stages!
Stages 1–5: 50 pieces
Stages 6–10: 100 pieces
Stages 11–15: 150 pieces
The later stages are tough ones with no background watermark!
Take your time, observe each piece carefully, and complete the puzzle!
=====================
We support game streamers!
No permission is required to stream this game.
